ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film project */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Internal project code for reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status (e.g., Pre-production, Production, Post-production, Released) */,
  "production_budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for film production */,
  "domestic_gross" INTEGER /* Total domestic box office gross revenue */,
  "international_gross" INTEGER /* Total international box office gross revenue */,
  "total_gross" INTEGER /* Total combined gross revenue (domestic + international) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film (e.g., PG-13, R, G) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project phase */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the project (e.g., Pre-production, Production, Post-production) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the phase (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "phase_lead" TEXT /* Lead person responsible for the phase */,
  "phase_members" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_items" (
  "budget_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget item */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the budget item (e.g., Salaries, Equipment, Location) */,
  "estimated_cost" INTEGER /* Estimated cost for the budget item */,
  "actual_cost" INTEGER /* Actual cost incurred for the budget item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget item (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor or supplier for the budget item */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase for the budget item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_sources" (
  "revenue_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue source */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of revenue source (e.g., Domestic Box Office, International Box Office, Streaming) */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the revenue source */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of revenue */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the revenue transaction */,
  "revenue_stream" TEXT /* Revenue stream (e.g., Theatrical, Home Video, VOD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_sources_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial report (e.g., Budget Analysis, Revenue Forecast, ROI Analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Producer, Director, Financial Analyst, Marketing) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film project */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production team */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the production team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the team's involvement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the team's involvement */,
  "team_department" TEXT /* Department of the production team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_teams_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the marketing campaign (e.g., TV, Social Media, Print) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "revenue_impact" INTEGER /* Estimated revenue impact of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the distributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributor_movies" (
  "distributor_movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor-movie relationship */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution (e.g., Theatrical, Digital) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the distribution contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the distribution contract */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory for distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributor_movies_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributor_movies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., general, task, issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, storyline, acting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Academy Award, Cannes Film Festival) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result (e.g., Won, Nominated) */,
  "nominee" TEXT /* Name of the nominee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_and_crew" (
  "cast_and_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast and crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast and crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the film (e.g., actor, director, producer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department (e.g., production, sound, camera) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_and_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_and_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filming_locations" (
  "filming_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filming location */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film project */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the filming location */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Address of the filming location */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City of the filming location */,
  "location_state" TEXT /* State of the filming location */,
  "location_country" TEXT /* Country of the filming location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filming_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filming_locations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
